description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, secondary, and deploy, and make all jobs run only on the main branch. Add a build-stage job named create-html that uses the image registry.gitlab.com/oer/emacs-reveal/emacs-reveal:9.44.0, runs before_script commands `git restore-mtime`, `git submodule sync --recursive`, `git submodule update --init --recursive`, then executes a script that (1) `curl -f -L "$CI_PROJECT_URL/-/jobs/artifacts/main/download?job=pages" -o artifacts.zip || echo "curl failed"`, (2) `if [ -f artifacts.zip ]; then unzip -n artifacts.zip -d old-artifacts; fi`, (3) `if [ -f .old-artifacts-dirs-for-removal ]; then xargs rm -rf < .old-artifacts-dirs-for-removal; fi`, (4) `mv old-artifacts/public/.org-timestamps ~ || true`, (5) `cp -r old-artifacts/public . || true`, (6) `rm -f public/.org-re-reveal.log`, (7) `emacs --batch --load elisp/publish.el`, (8) `find public -type f -regex '.*\.(html\|js\|css)$' -exec gzip -f -k {} \;`, (9) `cp -r ~/.org-timestamps public`, (10) `mkdir -p public/pdfs public/audio`, (11) `chmod -R 777 public`; the job should archive the `public` directory as an artifact that expires in four weeks. Add a secondary-stage job named generate-pdf that uses the image registry.gitlab.com/oer/emacs-reveal/selenium-chrome, includes the service selenium/standalone-chrome, and runs a script that checks for `public/.org-re-reveal.log`; if present it creates `new-pdfs`, sets permissions with `chmod 777 new-pdfs`, runs `python3 "/root/selenium-print-pdf.py" "$(pwd -P)/public/.org-re-reveal.log" selenium__standalone-chrome "$(pwd -P)/new-pdfs"`, moves the PDFs with `mv new-pdfs/* public/pdfs`, otherwise echoes "No new presentations.", and publishes `public` as a four‑week artifact. Add another secondary-stage job named tts that uses the image registry.gitlab.com/oer/emacs-reveal/tts and runs `if [ -d public/tts ]; then python3 /tts/tts.py public/tts public/audio; fi` followed by `rm -f "public/audio/*wav"`, also archiving `public` for four weeks. Finally, add a deploy-stage job named pages that runs `echo "Dummy"` and publishes the `public` directory as the GitLab Pages artifact.
